ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the hotel's page on TripAdvisor */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality where the hotel is located */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hotel's information */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the hotel */,
  "tripadvisor_rating" REAL /* TripAdvisor rating for the hotel */,
  "check_in" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "price_per_night" INTEGER /* Price per night for the booking */,
  "booking_provider" TEXT /* Booking provider (e.g., Booking.com, Hotels.com) */,
  "no_of_deals" INTEGER /* Number of deals available for the hotel */,
  "hotel_features" TEXT /* Features offered by the hotel (e.g., Free Wifi, Breakfast included) */,
  "hotel_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the hotel */,
  "hotel_phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the hotel */,
  "hotel_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the hotel */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Hotel's star rating (e.g., 3-star, 5-star) */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Hotel's longitude coordinate */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Hotel's latitude coordinate */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Additional amenities offered by the hotel */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Hotel's cancellation policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the booking provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the booking provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the booking provider */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for integration with the booking provider's system */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate charged by the booking provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traveler, hotel manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "password_salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the user */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the user is enrolled in */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" INTEGER /* Total price for the booking */,
  "no_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests for the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "booking_status_history" TEXT /* History of status updates for the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Number of points required to redeem a reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program offering the reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the reward */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Number of points required to redeem the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
